title: Impact section uses vague language instead of metrics
code_snippet:
## Impact Assessment

The service was down for a while. Some users were affected.
It was pretty bad. We lost some revenue probably.
violated_rule: Impact quantified with metrics — duration, users affected, error rates
expected_feedback: Standard: impact section contains no quantified metrics. 'A while' and 'some users' are not actionable. Specify: exact duration (e.g., 47 minutes), affected users (e.g., ~12,000), error rate (e.g., 15.2% 5xx), SLO budget consumed, revenue impact if measurable. Mark unknowns as 'UNKNOWN' rather than guessing.
